toolPurpose: Retrieve payments with optional filters by date range, payment status, or customer ID. Enables financial transaction analysis and payment history tracking.

begin_at.description: Start timestamp in RFC 3339 format (e.g., '2026-03-01T00:00:00Z') to filter payments from this date onwards

end_at.description: End timestamp in RFC 3339 format (e.g., '2026-03-05T23:59:59Z') to filter payments up to this date

cursor.description: Pagination cursor for retrieving the next page of results

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-200, default 100)

toolPurpose: Search orders with optional filters by customer ID, location ID, state, or date range. Enables order tracking, fulfillment analysis, and customer order history retrieval.

location_id.description: Filter orders by specific location ID

customer_id.description: Filter orders for a specific customer

begin_time.description: Start timestamp in RFC 3339 format for date range filter

end_time.description: End timestamp in RFC 3339 format for date range filter

cursor.description: Pagination cursor for retrieving the next page of results

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-100, default 50)

toolPurpose: Retrieve customer directory with optional filters by group or date range. Enables customer relationship management, customer analytics, and personalized business insights.

group_id.description: Filter customers by customer group ID

created_at.description: RFC 3339 format timestamp to filter customers created after this date

cursor.description: Pagination cursor for retrieving the next page of results

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-100, default 50)

toolPurpose: List catalog items and products with optional type filtering. Enables inventory management, product pricing analysis, and catalog organization visibility.

types.description: Comma-separated list of catalog object types to retrieve (e.g., 'ITEM,ITEM_VARIATION,IMAGE')

cursor.description: Pagination cursor for retrieving the next page of results

include_related_data.description: Whether to include related objects like variations and images

toolPurpose: Retrieve all business locations managed by the Square merchant account. Enables multi-location operations visibility and location-specific business analytics.

location_id.description: Specific location ID to retrieve details for a single location
